name: Apple HIG Designer
description_en: Design Apple-style iOS and macOS interfaces that follow the Human Interface Guidelines—SF Symbols, San Francisco typography, and proper accessibility.
description_zh: 设计遵循 Apple 人机界面指南(HIG)的 iOS / macOS 风格界面——SF Symbols、San Francisco 字体与规范的可访问性。
long_en: Produces HIG-compliant components to Apple-design-team quality standards, with optional modern visual effects and support for implementing design-system specs.
long_zh: 以 Apple 设计团队的质量标准产出符合 HIG 的组件,支持可选的现代视觉效果与按设计系统规范落地。
sec_note_en: Generates UI code and design assets locally; review before shipping.
sec_note_zh: 在本地生成 UI 代码与设计素材;上线前请审阅。
